providerExtensions.name: MCP Manager UI
providerExtensions.description: Factory added a dedicated MCP Manager UI in release 1.10, providing a graphical interface for connecting and managing MCP servers without manual JSON editing.

providerExtensions.name: Factory as MCP Server
providerExtensions.description: Factory CLI can itself act as an MCP server, enabling programmatic control and integration with other tools that speak the MCP client protocol.
